headline: Veralto (VLTO) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Veralto stock performance snapshot and business overview Veralto (VLTO) has drawn fresh investor attention after a period where the stock is down 4.7% over the past month and 8.4% over the past 3 months, with year to date returns down 16.1%. At a last close of US$82.64 and a market cap of about US$20.3b, Veralto sits in the commercial services space, anchored by two main segments: Water Quality, and Product Quality & Innovation. See our latest analysis for Veralto. That recent 4.7% 1 month...

headline: Active Energy, Quantum Blockchain Technologies, Metir, Poolbeg Pharma, IXICO, Coiled Therapeutics
summary: Active Energy Group PLC (AIM:AEG, OTCID:AEUSF) says its Ghummud facility in Abu Dhabi generated $110,000 in revenue in its first full month, with 97% uptime. The company is now targeting expansion into Bahrain and Saudi Arabia using the same infrastructure-led model. Quantum Blockchain Technologies PLC (AIM:QBT) says integration of a new ASIC mining rig is complete and data is now flowing into its Method C AI Oracle. Management expects it has enough data for training, with live deployment still targeted by the end of June. Metir PLC (AIM:MET) has secured its first PFAS detector sale to Nasdaq-listed water quality company Veralto. The group is also adding AI-powered data analysis and expanding water-monitoring projects in international markets. Poolbeg Pharma PLC (AIM:POLB, OTC:POLBF) has activated the first site in its POLB 001 TOPICAL clinical trial for cytokine release syndrome. The study will enrol 30 multiple myeloma patients, with early results expected within weeks. IXICO PLC (LSE:IXI, OTC:PHYOF) has appointed three internationally recognised experts to its Scientific Advisory Board. The company is also partnering with the Paris Brain Institute on new MRI biomarkers for Parkinson’s disease. Coiled Therapeutics (AIM:COIL, OTCQB:COTXF) has appointed TACC3 biology expert Professor Ozgur Sahin as a Scientific Advisor. Early AO-252 data has shown signs of tumour regression with no safety concerns reported so far. Follow us and subscribe on YouTube, our social channels, and on proactiveinvestors.co.uk.

Quantum Blockchain Technologies PLC (AIM:QBT) says integration of a new ASIC mining rig is complete and data is now flowing into its Method C AI Oracle. Management expects it has enough data for training, with live deployment still targeted by the end of June.

Metir PLC (AIM:MET) has secured its first PFAS detector sale to Nasdaq-listed water quality company Veralto. The group is also adding AI-powered data analysis and expanding water-monitoring projects in international markets.

Poolbeg Pharma PLC (AIM:POLB, OTC:POLBF) has activated the first site in its POLB 001 TOPICAL clinical trial for cytokine release syndrome. The study will enrol 30 multiple myeloma patients, with early results expected within weeks.

IXICO PLC (LSE:IXI, OTC:PHYOF) has appointed three internationally recognised experts to its Scientific Advisory Board. The company is also partnering with the Paris Brain Institute on new MRI biomarkers for Parkinson’s disease.

Coiled Therapeutics (AIM:COIL, OTCQB:COTXF) has appointed TACC3 biology expert Professor Ozgur Sahin as a Scientific Advisor. Early AO-252 data has shown signs of tumour regression with no safety concerns reported so far.

Follow us and subscribe on YouTube, our social channels, and on proactiveinvestors.co.uk.
